name: live freshness gate emit fields output is consumable by downstream provenance manifest emitter
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --emit fields 2>out.txt && grep -q 'freshness_at_generation=fresh-within-fetch-frequency' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
